---
pagetitle: "Agentic Basics"
title: "[Agentic Basics]{.amber}"
---

## About {.center style="font-size: 30px; line-height: 1.5;"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="38%"}
:::

::: {.column width="62%"}
- _Speaker bio placeholder._
:::
:::

## Agenda {.light-centered .center}

- Assistants vs Agents
- Architecture
- Handy Tools

## [Assistants]{.teal} vs [Agents]{.amber} {.dark-centered .center}

_Section content placeholder._

## Architecture {.light-centered .center}

_Section content placeholder._

## Handy Tools {.light-centered .center}

_Section content placeholder._
